title: Communauté de communes du Santerre
summary: The Communauté de communes du Santerre  is a former communauté de communes in the Somme département and in the Picardie région of France. It was created in December 1993. It was merged into the new Communauté de communes Terre de Picardie in January 2017.
text:
The Communauté de communes du Santerre  is a former communauté de communes in the Somme département and in the Picardie région of France. It was created in December 1993. It was merged into the new Communauté de communes Terre de Picardie in January 2017.

Composition
This Communauté de communes comprised 20 communes:
